TestCase z12Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_x = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_x, t1.x, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.x = follow_case_x;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        // No elements to shift, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: right circular shift (move last element to front)
    double temp = follow_case.x[follow_case.n - 1];
    for (int i = follow_case.n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        follow_case.x[i] = follow_case.x[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.x[0] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
